summary: Iteration 4 — single E2E automated UI test against the new 7-step wallet-based onboarding flow on the running Expo web preview. PASSED end-to-end with a fresh phone number (+91 98xxxxxxxx, randomized per run). Flow: send-otp → DEV OTP captured from banner → verify-otp → menu preview → name='QA Onboard Family' → pincode 600020 (Adyar) serviceable → address='Flat 9 QA Block, Chennai' → preferences (meals=lunch+dinner default, size=couple, lunch variant=without_rice, live estimate rendered '₹680/day') → topup preset 6000 (summary correctly read '₹6,000 covers about 8 days at ₹680/day') → submit → customer landed on /(customer)/home. Home wallet banner showed ₹6000 with ≈8 days at ₹680/day. Navigated to /wallet — header amount ₹6000, '8 days left', '₹680 per day', pricing grid rendered (Breakfast 230/340/460, Lunch w/ rice 268/385/530, Lunch no rice 240/340/460, Dinner 230/340/460), and the 'Welcome top-up' credit txn was present in Recent activity. The /api/wallet/me response is implicitly verified because the Wallet screen renders directly from that endpoint (balance=6000, daily_burn=680, days_left=8, 'Welcome top-up' credit txn all visible on screen). Two non-blocking RN deprecation warnings observed in console (shadow* and props.pointerEvents).

react_native_issues.component: StyleSheet shadow props (multiple screens via theme.shadow.card)
react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Migrate shadow* to boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/lib/theme.ts (or wherever shadow.card is defined) for future RN Web compatibility.

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely emitted from a third-party component during the done→home transition; locate caller and move to style.pointerEvents.

test_report_links: Inline Playwright script executed via mcp_browser_automation (no persisted .py file — single-run E2E as requested)
action_items: (Optional) Migrate theme shadow.card to boxShadow to silence RN Web deprecation warning.
(Optional) Locate and replace the deprecated `props.pointerEvents` usage (likely an internal RN-Web component bridge call) with `style.pointerEvents`.
critical_code_review_comments: onboarding.tsx: refresh() is called inside setTimeout(800ms) after setStep('done'). Works (verified — auth context re-fetches /me and the root layout routes /(customer)/home). However, a manual error in /complete after a successful auth state change would leave the user stuck on the 'done' screen. Consider awaiting refresh() and routing explicitly rather than relying on the root layout's auth-state branching.
onboarding.tsx submit() does not disable the 'Skip topup' button while busy — minor; not exploitable in this flow.

home.tsx WALLET banner: low-balance gating uses wallet.low boolean from backend (good). At ₹6000/680 = 8 days, low correctly evaluates false and the red border was NOT shown — consistent with expected behaviour.
wallet.tsx 'Recent activity' txn list uses t.id as key, which is correct, but the empty-state vs populated branch is fine.

success_rate.backend: skipped (frontend-only per request) — API responses indirectly verified via UI rendering

seed_data_creation: One new TEST customer created via the onboarding flow per run with a randomized fresh phone (latest run: +919847693733). Name 'QA Onboard Family', pincode 600020 (Adyar), address 'Flat 9 QA Block, Chennai', meals=lunch+dinner, size=couple, lunch_variant=without_rice, welcome topup ₹6000. Each test run will create a fresh customer because the script randomizes the phone — main agent may want to prune TEST_* customers periodically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding flow + post-onboarding home + wallet integration confirmed working end-to-end on https://fresh-feast-app-1.preview.emergentagent.com via the local 0.0.0.0:3000 ingress. All required testIDs (onboarding-start, onboarding-name, onboarding-next-name, onboarding-pincode, onboarding-check-pincode, onboarding-address, onboarding-next-address, meal-chip-{breakfast|lunch|dinner}, size-{single|couple|family}, variant-{with_rice|without_rice}, onboarding-daily-estimate, onboarding-next-prefs, topup-{3000|6000|10000}, topup-custom-toggle, topup-custom-input, topup-summary, onboarding-skip-topup, onboarding-submit, wallet-banner, wallet-balance, wallet-amount) are present and operational. For inline-page API verification (fetch from page context) note that the JWT is stored by Expo's AsyncStorage; on web preview, it may NOT be in localStorage by direct key — prefer to call the backend with a freshly minted token issued via /api/auth/verify-otp or to assert via the visible UI as this iteration did.
